metadata.name: GibbsTS
classifiers: License :: OSI Approved :: GNU General Public License v3 (GPLv3)
metadata.summary: GTS: An automated toolkit for building Gibbs thermodynamic surface with application to obtain high-pressure melting data.

modules.name: gibbs_thermo_surface_06
documentation:
GTS -- Gibbs Thermodynamic Surface: an automated toolkit to obtain high-pressure melting data

Copyright (C) 2024-2024 by Kun Yin and Xuan Zhao

E-mail: yinkun@cdut.edu.cn

functions.name: gibbs_thermo_surface_06.generate_TGP
documentation:
Generate temperature, Gibbs free energy, and pressure data for a given phase.

Parameters:
phase_type (str): The phase type ('solid' or 'liquid').
dictionary (dict): The dictionary containing data.

Returns:
tuple: Meshgrid arrays for temperature, Gibbs free energy, and interpolated pressure data.

functions.name: gibbs_thermo_surface_06.save_contour_lines
documentation:
Save contour lines for a given phase at a specified pressure level to a file.

Parameters:
phase (str): The phase type ('solid' or 'liquid').
level (float): The pressure level to generate contour lines for.
dictionary (dict): The dictionary containing data.

functions.name: gibbs_thermo_surface_06.contour_line
documentation:
Generate and save contour lines of Gibbs free energy for both solid and liquid phases.

Parameters:
p (float): The pressure level.
n (str): The filename prefix for the input JSON file.

functions.name: gibbs_thermo_surface_04.entropy_calibration
documentation:
Calibrate the entropy of the liquid phase against the solid phase at reference temperature and pressure.

Parameters:
a (float): Reference temperature factor.
b (float): Reference pressure factor.

functions.name: gibbs_thermo_surface_05.generate_derived_surface
documentation:
Generate derived surface data for a given phase.

Parameters:
phase (str): The phase for which to generate the surface data ('solid' or 'liquid').
nV (str): Number of volume data points.
nT (str): Number of temperature data points.

functions.name: gibbs_thermo_surface_03.eos
documentation: 3rd-order Birch-Murnaghan Equation of State (EoS).

functions.name: gibbs_thermo_surface_03.A_without_constant
documentation: Helmholtz free energy by integration of EoS (without constant A0).

functions.name: gibbs_thermo_surface_03.func_ST
documentation: Calculate entropy S as a function of T.

functions.name: gibbs_thermo_surface_03.func_TS
documentation: Calculate temperature T as a function of S.

functions.name: gibbs_thermo_surface_03.func_UV
documentation: Calculate internal energy U as a function of V.

functions.name: gibbs_thermo_surface_03.bm3
documentation: Birch-Murnaghan 3rd-order EoS for optimization.

functions.name: gibbs_thermo_surface_03.objective
documentation: Objective function for least squares optimization.

functions.name: gibbs_thermo_surface_03.func_US
documentation: Calculate internal energy U as a function of entropy S.

functions.name: gibbs_thermo_surface_03.parabola
documentation: Parabolic function for fitting.

functions.name: gibbs_thermo_surface_03.read_data
documentation: Read data from a file.

functions.name: gibbs_thermo_surface_03.write_data
documentation: Write data to a file.

functions.name: gibbs_thermo_surface_03.surface_03
documentation: Main function for Gibbs Thermodynamic Surface analysis.

documentation: BirchMurnaghan equation from PRB 70, 224107

functions.name: gibbs_surf.fit_US

functions.name: gibbs_thermo_surface_02.fit_linear_functions
documentation: Fit linear functions U(T)=a*T+b and p(T)=d*T+e for data in V*.txt files.

functions.name: gibbs_thermo_surface_01.read_data
documentation: Read data from the input file.

functions.name: gibbs_thermo_surface_01.write_mid_temperature
documentation: Calculate and write the middle temperature to mid_T.txt.

functions.name: gibbs_thermo_surface_01.write_volumes
documentation: Write unique volumes to V.txt.

functions.name: gibbs_thermo_surface_01.write_single_volumes
documentation: Write pressure, energy, and temperature for each unique volume.

functions.name: gibbs_thermo_surface_01.surface_01
documentation: Read input files of two phase and convert units.

variables.name: gibbs_thermo_surface_01.kBar_tO_internal_p
documentation: kBar ==> 1e+10 Pa

variables.name: gibbs_thermo_surface_01.eV_tO_internal_U
documentation: eV/atom ==> 1e-19 J/atom

variables.name: gibbs_thermo_surface_01.volume_to_internal_V
documentation: A^3/atom ==> 1e-29 m^3/atom

variables.name: gibbs_thermo_surface_01.precision
documentation: Number of decimal places to retain

functions.name: gibbs_thermo_surface_08.print_internal
documentation:
Print internal thermodynamic properties for solid and liquid phases.

Parameters:
data (str): Path to the data file containing melting pressure and temperature.
name (str): Name of the material, used to load the corresponding JSON file.

functions.name: gibbs_thermo_surface_08.print_vasp_type
documentation:
Print thermodynamic properties in VASP units for solid and liquid phases.

Parameters:
data (str): Path to the data file containing melting pressure and temperature.
name (str): Name of the material, used to load the corresponding JSON file.
convert units to VASP standard

functions.name: gibbs_thermo_surface_07.get_cross_point
documentation:
Find the intersection point of Gibbs free energy curves for solid and liquid phases.

Parameters:
level_str (str): The pressure level as a string.
cp (file object): The file object to write the melting point.
x_label (str): Label for the x-axis of the plot.
y_label (str): Label for the y-axis of the plot.
n (str): The filename prefix for the plot.

Returns:
float: The melting temperature.

functions.name: gibbs_thermo_surface_07.get_melting_data
documentation:
Generate and save melting data for given pressure.

Parameters:
p (float): The pressure level.
n (str): The filename prefix for the input JSON file.
